ddls:
CREATE TABLE "font_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each font file */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the font file */,
  "definition_key" INTEGER /* Reference to the definition of the font */,
  "locale_key" INTEGER /* Reference to the locale for localization */,
  "file_key" INTEGER /* Unique key for the font file */,
  "project_key" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated project */,
  "gc_marked" INTEGER /* Indicator if the font is globally marked for use */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the font file */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the font file was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the font file was last updated */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who uploaded the font file */,
  "is_global" INTEGER /* Indicator if the font is globally marked for use */,
  "license_key" TEXT /* License key for the font file */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the font file in bytes */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the font file (e.g., .ttf, .otf) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_font_files_definition_key FOREIGN KEY ("definition_key") REFERENCES font_definitions ("definition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_font_files_locale_key FOREIGN KEY ("locale_key") REFERENCES locales ("locale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_font_files_project_key FOREIGN KEY ("project_key") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "font_definitions" (
  "definition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each font definition */,
  "definition_name" TEXT /* Name of the font definition */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the font definition was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the font definition was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the font definition */,
  "is_bold" INTEGER /* Indicator if the font definition is bold */,
  "is_italic" INTEGER /* Indicator if the font definition is italic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("definition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locales" (
  "locale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each locale */,
  "locale_name" TEXT /* Name of the locale */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the locale was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the locale was last updated */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* ISO country code for the locale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("locale_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was last updated */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., active, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)
